title: 秋華賞の後に・冠、掲げて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober seizes first place! And with that...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's won the Triple Tiara! The Mejiro family has
once again claimed the glory of the Tiara! History
has been made today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I won... I won the Triple Tiara...

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dobeeeer, you did it! Hic! Congratulations! You did so well! Thank you for that amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Dobeeer! You really, truly, absolutely are the
coolest ever!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Dober! Dober! Dober! Dober! Dober! Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can't believe it! I'm so happy. I'm so happy! Oh
no, I feel like I'm going to start crying...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Ramonu didn't cry, so I won't either!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(After all, I can hold my head up high and be
proud too!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That was quite the race. You know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe there would be another Mejiro
racer who would be able to seize all three of the
tiaras after you.
Hehe... Yes, that's true.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The next time we meet, you and I will be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go out to meet Mejiro Dober after she returns,
amidst the crowd's cheers. Her expression is
brimming with satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You too. Congrats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Congratulations to you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching me out there? I bet you didn't
even blink.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching me? Did you take in the
entire race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What you witnessed was the Triple Tiara we won
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What you witnessed was the Triple Tiara we won
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've said this before, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you for believing in my strength, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We celebrate our victory together and take a new
step toward our next challenge!
